message:
fix(models): correct reasoning model detection for Claude 3 Haiku/Opus and Gemini thinking

- Claude 3 Haiku, 3.5 Haiku, and Claude 3 Opus do NOT support extended
  thinking; only Claude 3.5 Sonnet and Claude 4+ do
- Add gemini-2.0-flash-thinking to reasoning model list
- Simplify Cohere command-r/command-a handling (both support reasoning)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
